name: chr19_19p13_11_INSR_SD
description: 19p13.2 SD region containing INSR (insulin receptor) and ARID3A. Short intra-chromosomal SD blocks of 10-30 kb at 93-97% identity flank INSR and contribute to GRCh38 mapping ambiguity around the gene boundaries.

architecture.internal_structure: Short 5-30 kb intra-chromosomal SDs at 93-97% identity flanking INSR exonic regions; partial inter-chromosomal SD to IGF1R region on chr15.
